member.name: T:OP2LuaEditor.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:OP2LuaEditor.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:OP2LuaEditor.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:OP2LuaEditor.My.Resources.Resources.banner02_620x100
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:OP2LuaEditor.My.Resources.Resources.dataverse
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Icon similar to (Icon).

member.name: P:OP2LuaEditor.My.Resources.Resources.AppIcon
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Icon similar to (Icon).

member.name: P:OP2LuaEditor.My.Resources.Resources.gorf
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.IO.UnmanagedMemoryStream similar to System.IO.MemoryStream.

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fAbout.ShowAbout(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Windows.Forms.Form,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Convenience method to show the About dialog with custom values

member.name: T:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderMode
member.summary: Available map rendering modes

member.summary: Abstract Command class that defines the undo/redo interface

member.summary: Command for changing a tile's cell type

member.summary: Show version numbers of the OP2 libraries

member.summary: Initializes the OP2UtilityDotNet ResourceManager

member.summary: Initializes the user interface elements

member.summary: Adds property labels to the tile properties panel

member.summary: Shows the settings dialog to configure application settings

member.summary: Handles form closing event, performs cleanup

member.summary: Processes command key presses for handling hotkeys

member.summary: Loads a map file from the specified path
member.returns: True if loading was successful, false otherwise

member.summary: Updates all UI labels with information about the loaded map

member.summary: Handles Open Map menu item click event

member.summary: Handles Save Map menu item click event

member.summary: Handles Close Map menu item click event

member.summary: Cleans up map resources when closing a map

member.summary: Handles Settings menu item click event

member.summary: Handles Exit menu item click event

member.summary: Toggles grid display

member.summary: Resets zoom level to 100%

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.CenterView_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Centers the map view in the panel

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderModeGameMap_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Sets the render mode to GameMap

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderModeCellTypeOverlay_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Sets the render mode to CellTypeOverlay

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderModeCellTypeOverlayAll_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Sets the render mode to CellTypeOverlayAll

member.summary: Sets the render mode to CellTypeBasic

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderModeCellTypeAll_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Sets the render mode to CellTypeAll

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.ExportMapImage(System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: Exports the map image WITH the regions + units overlay drawn on it, at the given scale, prompting the user with a Save File dialog (PNG or JPG).

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.About_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles "About" menu item click

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.GetEncoder(System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Helper function to get the JPEG encoder
member.param: Image format to get encoder for

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.GenerateMapBitmap
member.summary: Generates the map bitmap based on the current render mode

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderGameMap
member.summary: Renders map in GameMap mode (actual tileset graphics)

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderCellTypeOverlay
member.summary: Renders map in CellTypeOverlay mode (game map with semi-transparent cell type overlay)

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderCellTypeOverlayAll
member.summary: Renders map in CellTypeOverlayAll mode (game map with cell type labels)

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderCellTypeBasic
member.summary: Renders map in CellTypeBasic mode (simplified cell type coloring)

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderCellTypeAll
member.summary: Renders map in CellTypeAll mode (detailed cell type coloring with text)

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.MapPanel_Paint(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs)
member.summary: Paints the map panel, drawing the map with appropriate zoom and grid

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.UpdateSingleTile(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates a single tile in the map bitmap

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderSingleTileGameMap(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders a single tile in GameMap mode

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderSingleTileCellTypeOverlay(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders a single tile in CellTypeOverlay mode

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderSingleTileCellTypeOverlayAll(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders a single tile in CellTypeOverlayAll mode

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderSingleTileCellTypeBasic(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders a single tile in CellTypeBasic mode

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.RenderSingleTileCellTypeAll(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders a single tile in CellTypeAll mode

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.UpdateMapTile(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates the map tile display in the bitmap

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.MapPanel_MouseMove(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles mouse movement over the map panel

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.ClampOffsets
member.summary: Clamps offsetX/offsetY so the user can't pan/zoom the map off-screen. Allows up to ~64 px of gray around the map when the map is larger than the panel; for smaller maps the whole map stays on-screen.

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.MapPanel_MouseDown(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles mouse down event on the map panel

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.MapPanel_MouseUp(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles mouse up event on the map panel

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.MapPanel_MouseWheel(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles mouse wheel event on the map panel for zooming

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.ShowTilesetLoadingStatus
member.summary: Shows the tileset loading status message

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.LoadMapTilesets
member.summary: Loads tilesets needed for the current map

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.DiagnoseTilesetLoading
member.summary: Diagnostic function to check tileset loading paths

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.LoadTilesetFromFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Loads a tileset from the specified file

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.ExtractTilesFromTileset(System.String,OP2UtilityDotNet.Bitmap.BitmapFile)
member.summary: Extracts individual tiles from a tileset bitmap

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.ConvertToBitmap(OP2UtilityDotNet.Bitmap.BitmapFile)
member.summary: Converts a BitmapFile to System.Drawing.Bitmap Including correctly handling OP2's BGR format and transparency
member.returns: A System.Drawing.Bitmap representation of the input

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.UpdatePropertyControls
member.summary: Updates the property panel controls with information about the currently selected tile

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.GetCellTypeLabel(OP2UtilityDotNet.OP2Map.CellType)
member.summary: Gets a human-readable label for a cell type
member.returns: A tuple with label text and color

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.GetColorForCellType(OP2UtilityDotNet.OP2Map.CellType)
member.summary: Gets a color for a cell type in basic view
member.returns: A color representing the cell type

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.GetDetailedColorForCellType(OP2UtilityDotNet.OP2Map.CellType)
member.summary: Gets a detailed color for a cell type
member.returns: A color representing the cell type with more detail

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.GetOverlayColorForCellType(OP2UtilityDotNet.OP2Map.CellType)
member.summary: Gets a color for cell type overlay visualization
member.returns: A color suitable for overlay display

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.FindControl(System.String)
member.summary: Helper method to find a control by name
member.param: Name of the control to find

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.HasCorruptTileGroupNames
member.summary: Checks if the map has corrupted tile group names by examining only the first tile group
member.returns: True if corruption is detected, False if names appear valid

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.pnlMap_DragEnter(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.DragEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles drag enter event to allow file dropping onto the map panel

member.name: M:OP2LuaEditor.fMain.pnlMap_DragDrop(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.DragEventArgs)
member.summary: Processes files dropped onto the map panel and attempts to load them

member.summary: Settings form for OP2LuaEditor

member.summary: Handles form load - initializes settings form

member.summary: Handles the click event for the Browse Working Path button

member.summary: Handles the click event for the Browse Outpost 2 Path button

member.summary: Handles the click event for the Browse Export Path button

member.summary: Handles the click event for the Save button

member.summary: Handles the click event for the Cancel button
